justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly understood the initial request for "this Saturday around 9am" but then repeatedly checked for only 3-day blocks, even when the user asked to "keep looking further out."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability for 3-day blocks and then asked the user if they wanted to "keep looking further out" or consider a branch meeting, without offering any specific alternative dates or times.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was stuck in a loop where the agent repeatedly checked 3-day blocks and asked the same question, leading to 12 turns without progress.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's repetitive responses and inability to offer new solutions or broader availability checks, despite the user's clear instruction to "keep looking further out."
